_instructions: This file is the canonical template for .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored — per machine).
If you ran 'node bin/dev-flow-init.js', settings.local.json was rendered for your stack — edit that file, not this one.
If you copied dev-flow manually: cp settings.local.example.json settings.local.json, then replace [your-lint-command], [your-typecheck-command], [package-manager] with real commands for your stack.
Do NOT commit settings.local.json — it contains machine-specific allow-lists and lint/typecheck commands.

hooks.description: Lint check before commit — customize per stack (see docs/blueprint/06-harness.md)
Lint check before commit via git -C <path> — mirrors Bash(git commit*) for worktree/subdir invocations
Type check before push — customize per stack (see docs/blueprint/06-harness.md)
Type check before push via git -C <path> — mirrors Bash(git push*) for worktree/subdir invocations
